top.title: Ukrainian drones target St Petersburg in attack Russia calls 'unprecedented'
top.summary: Residents of Russia's second-largest city were urged to stay indoors for the first time since the war started.

top.title: US and Iran exchange strikes in Gulf in latest test of ceasefire
top.summary: The US military strikes Iranian drones and radar sites and Tehran says it has targeted US bases in Kuwait and Bahrain.

top.title: Hegseth attacks Europe over migration with beach 'invasion' D-Day speech
top.summary: The US defence secretary was speaking in Normandy, 82 years after allied forces launched their operation to liberate Nazi-occupied north-western Europe.

top.title: The gamers taking on the industry to stop it switching off games
top.summary: Stop Killing Games is challenging the idea publishers can shut down a game without making sure it's still playable.

top.title: Trump to meet AI leaders to discuss US investment in their companies
top.summary: The US president said on Friday he expects to meet the leaders of top AI companies next week.

top.title: Raspberry Pi raises profit forecast as AI demand grows
top.summary: The firm said it expected to deliver adjusted earnings of at least $38m (£28.2m) for the first half of 2026.
